lines.speaker: Ranael
lines.text: Do you want to buy any armoured skirts? Designed especially for ladies who like to fight.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you, that's not my scene.

sections.title: Using Al kharid flyer on Ranael

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi! I have this money off voucher!

lines.speaker: Ranael
lines.text: So I see! Unfortunately it seems to have expired yesterday! Nevermind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I only just got it!

lines.speaker: Ranael
lines.text: I'm sorry, there's nothing I can do. Goodbye.
